results.title: Atharva Kulkarni
highlights:
AI Researcher @ S&P Global · Generative AI | LLMs | Responsible AI | Agentic AI · Building production-ready AI for regulated industries
...
Asset Research - AI & Data Engineer at [S&P Global](https://www.linkedin.com/company/spglobal)
...
I build AI systems that actually ship — and hold up in regulated, high-stakes environments. As an AI Researcher at S&P Global, I led the end-to-end development of a Generative AI Proof of Concept across the entire upstream division. The model cleared the internal POC governance review, clearing the bar for production-readiness in one of the most scrutinized data environments in financial services. I work directly with economists, global directors, and non-technical business leaders — translating confidence scores and model risk into decision-grade insights, always within a clear framework of responsible AI and ethical deployment.
